title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.629 - Four classes of election offenses
text:
115.629.  Four classes of election offenses. — There shall be four classes of election offenses consisting of all offenses arising under this chapter, and such other offenses as are specified by law.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 15.001, A.L. 2018 S.B. 592 merged with S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision) 
Effective 8-28-18 (S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision); 11-07-18 (S.B. 592)
